_comment: C counterpart of benchmark_queries.json. Same query shapes and gold-module intent as the Python fixture, with expected_modules pointing at tests/fixtures/sample_project_c source paths. Used to measure top-k retrieval hit-rate for the bundled tree-sitter C extractor.

queries.question: How does authentication work in this codebase?
What are the main API endpoints and how are requests routed?
Explain the billing flow and how invoices are charged.
Where are user records created and stored?
How is a JWT token signed and verified?
How are refunds issued through the payment processor?
What happens when a new user is created?
How is a database connection opened and queries executed?
What outcomes can an authentication attempt produce?
How is an incoming request dispatched to the right handler?
